headline: What Fortinet Stock Was Telling Wall Street About AI Before It Doubled
summary: The secret to the cybersecurity firm's explosive surge lay beyond the headline financials: a new type of customer management had just started talking about.

headline: WatchGuard Appoints Vincent Hwang as Chief Product Officer to Accelerate Platform Strategy and AI-Driven Innovation

summary: Before the stock nearly doubled, the company’s own earnings calls were pointing to a powerful new growth engine firing up in the one place most people had stopped looking.
